name: POLICY-BACKLOG-1
title: Add coding rule: do not create documentation files unless explicitly requested
description: A recurring LLM behavior is gold-plating: creating README.md, summary.md, analysis.md, or report files unrequested. coding-rules.md should add explicit rule like 'NEVER proactively create documentation files (.md) or README files. Only create documentation files if explicitly requested.' (mirrors guidance found in default Claude Code system prompts). Add under section 3 (Surgical Changes) or as a new section. Location: .claude/features/policy/coding-rules.md.
